purpose: Pre-mirror 4 base model weights to Cloudflare R2 (free egress) so each H100 pod (#83 unified launch) downloads weights in <10 min instead of 30-60 min direct from HuggingFace.

policy.tokenizer_integrity_gate: sha256(tokenizer.json) recorded post-mirror; pod start-up MUST verify match before training begins

r2_endpoint_note: Cloudflare R2 — egress free; pod region-agnostic; rclone profile name configurable via env RCLONE_R2_REMOTE (default: r2anima)

p2.license: Llama 3.1 Community (unsloth mirror — gated bypass for research)
p2.mirror_rationale: official meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B is gated 403; unsloth mirror has identical weights + tokenizer (vocab 128256). Legal: Meta CL §1(b)(v) — research low-risk; commercial redistribution requires direct Meta/Kaggle.

p3.vision_handling: drop (text-only substrate — vision encoder weights still mirrored for reproducibility but not loaded at training)
p3.tokenizer_vocab_note: Tekken successor — vocab to be recorded on fetch

p4.vision_handling: drop via model.language_model submodule loading (text-only ~2.8GB save)
p4.tokenizer_note: Text token IDs identical to Gemma-3 (262144 SentencePiece) + multimodal sentinels 255999-258884

estimated_per_pod_savings_minutes_vs_hf_: ~30-50 min/pod (HF direct 30-60min → R2 <10min); 4 pods x ~$3/hr = ~$6-10 saved per launch

tokenizer_integrity_gate_protocol.phase_a_mirror: tool/h100_weight_precache.bash --apply downloads tokenizer.json from HF, computes sha256, writes back to this manifest under paths.<pid>.tokenizer_sha256
tokenizer_integrity_gate_protocol.phase_b_pod_startup: pod entrypoint downloads tokenizer.json from R2, computes sha256, compares against manifest. Mismatch → ABORT with non-zero exit before any weight load.
tokenizer_integrity_gate_protocol.rationale: Tokenizer drift is the single most insidious silent failure for cross-substrate Φ comparison (#10/#83). Cheap (one sha256) and load-bearing.

next_actions: Operator: provision Cloudflare R2 bucket 'anima-weights' if absent
Operator: export HF_TOKEN (for unsloth mirror — public but rate-limited without)
Verify: re-read this manifest — all paths.<pid>.tokenizer_sha256 must be 64-hex (no longer TBD-on-fetch)
Pod entrypoint: wire phase_b_pod_startup integrity check before weight load
